parameters.content: ## get pdf and information from MAIL

## Llama cloud accept all file type

nodes.name: non po Append data to sheet1
Extract PDF Content Using Gemini Vision

options.systemMessage:
=# Overview  
You are an AI agent task Extract details from text

# How to do exactly
Take all the details and make sure output separately 
 

# What you have to use
- Structured Output Parser

I saw you one Invoice detail output But make sure not all invoices are same So understand by self and generate output

I show you Example details outputs:
1. invoice number 
2. date 
3. Bill to 
4. Description (if in there : | Item No. | Description | Quantity | Unit Price | Total)
5. total
6. terms of payment 
7. Payment method 
8. Send payment to 
9. Payment address 
10. extra information: (like all extra details)
11. subtotal
12. PO number
13. tex
14. discount amount
15. delivery charges

## important:
- make sure only description output in Json format

parameters.content: ## Upload PDF to Google Drive and Share link to Google sheets
